speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj pati ne achanak kaha ki Sasu-ma aur Sasur-ji permanently shift ho rahe hain. Kehte hain meri 'umar' nikal rahi hai aur ghar waaris ke bina sunna hai. Main office aur ghar ke dual burden se pehle hi ghut rahi hoon, par parivaar ki 'izzat' bachane ke liye maine muskurakar haan keh diya. Andar se bahut helpless feel kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the sacrifice of silencing her own suffocation to protect the family honor.
text: Apne andar ki us bhayankar ghutan aur thakan ko chupate hue, maike aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye tumne khud ki aawaz ko bilkul daba diya...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki bade-buzurgo ke aage bolna hamare sanskar nahi hain. Office ka itna pressure hota hai, deadlines meet karni hoti hain, aur uske baad ghar aakar cooking. Main sab akele kaise karungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the overwhelming weight of the dual role she is forced into.
text: Ek taraf professional life ke strict targets aur doosri taraf ek bahu hone ki double duty, in dono ke beech yeh naya achanak aaya dabaav tumhe poori tarah se nichod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur ab waaris lane ka taana har roz sunna padega. Pata nahi main yeh sab kaise jhelungi. Par wahi hai, maike ki naak na kat jaye, isliye maine muskurakar haan keh diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unending duration of this new arrangement and expectations.
text: Itne lambe aane wale waqt ke baare mein soch kar, jahan roz ek nayi endless demand poori karni hogi, aage ka poora safar bahut lamba aur thaka dene wala lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thaka dene wala hi hai. Sach kahu toh mujhe bahut darr lag raha hai ki meri khud ki identity, mere apne sapne hi khatam ho jayenge is sab mein. Main bas ek waaris paida karne wali bankar reh jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of losing her identity.
text: Apni saari mehnat aur pehchaan ke is naye mahol mein poori tarah se mit jane ka aur sirf ek role tak simat jane ka khayal dil ko bohot dara raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Par agar main abhi kuch bhi palat kar bolungi, toh society bolegi ki aajkal ki padhi-likhi auratein toh bas ghar todti hain. Log kahenge ki iske maike walon ne isko aisi hi taleem di hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response: short restatement of the relational pressure, ending in a soft pause.
text: Samaj ke in taano aur maike ki izzat ke us darr ne tumhe poori tarah se baandh kar rakh diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bandh gayi hoon main. Andar itna frustration aur gussa hota hai kabhi kabhi apne pati par, par kalesh ke darr se bas chup rehti hoon. Unko toh bas apna aaram aur parents dikhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing the deepest pain under the frustration and duty.
text: In saare dabaav aur apne andar daba kar rakhe hue is frustration ke beech, is waqt tumhara dil sabse zyada kis baat ko lekar akela mehsoos kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Akela isliye lagta hai ki main sirf ek machine ban gayi hoon—office ka kaam karo, ghar ka kaam karo, aur ab unke liye ek waaris paida karo. Mera apna wajood kuch hai hi nahi, I am just a tool for them.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the exact feeling of being trapped and helpless due to relational preservation (C3 + RP).
text: Lagta hai is poori situation ne, jahan tumhara apna wajood sirf dusron ki zaroorat poori karne ki ek machine ban kar reh gaya hai, tumhe andar se bohot trapped aur helpless feel karwa diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, I feel completely trapped. Office mein mere colleagues apni career growth discuss karte hain, aur main sochti hoon ki ghar jaakar dinner mein kya banana hai saas-sasur ke liye taaki koi naraz na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings structurally within the Indian dual-burden context.
text: Humari society mein ek working aurat se career aur ghar dono jagah hundred percent perfection ki ummeed rakhna ek bahut unfair structural dabaav hai, is dual burden mein tumhara khud ko trapped mehsoos karna bilkul jayaz hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you ki kisi ne toh is pressure ko samjha. Mere pati ko toh isme koi issue dikhta hi nahi hai. Main bas unhe aur parents ko naraz karke kalesh nahi karna chahti, isliye akele akele ghutti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic anecdote about the silencing of working bahus.
text: Ek working bahu ke roop mein yeh akelapan aur double shift ki ghutan bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki bado ke aage chup rehna hi ek achi aurat ki nishani maani jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahih 'achi aurat' banne ke chakkar mein hi maine muskurakar haan keh diya tha. Par sach mein meri energy ab zero ho chuki hai. Mujhe lagta hai main physical aur mental dono tareeqe se bas toot jaungi is sab mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing mild risk with a warm normalizing line before restating her exhaustion.
text: Itni bhayankar thakan mein tootna mehsoos hona bilkul human hai, aap akele nahi ho isme. Apni saari energy is parivaar aur office ki duty mein lagane ke baad, ab andar se sab kuch sehne ki taqat khatam ho gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul khatam ho gayi hai. Weekend pe socha tha thoda rest karungi, ab unke aane ke baad woh bhi impossible lag raha hai. Unko har cheez apne hisaab aur waqt par chahiye hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feared consequence of losing her only time for rest.
text: Aage aane wale har weekend ko bina aaram ke, ek nayi endless routine mein badalte hue dekhne ka khayal us exhaustion ko aur bhi bada kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur bohot tension de raha hai. Main job toh nahi chhod sakti, na hi in laws ko direct mana kar sakti hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao main is dual burden mein khud ko kaise bachaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about professional women managing boundaries quietly.
text: Humare yahan aksar maan liya jata hai ki buzurgon ke sath rehne ka matlab aurat apna sara personal waqt unhe de, par professional obligations ka use karke apne waqt ko bachana kisi bhi tarah se unki izzat kam karna nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat mere pati aur in-laws ko kaun samjhayega? Agar main direct bolungi ki mujhe apne liye space chahiye toh bawal ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing low-effort, non-confrontational boundary-setting steps.
text: Do chote aur bina bawal wale tareeqe hum dekh sakte hain: Pehla, office se aate waqt 'traffic' ya 'late meeting' keh kar 15 minute car ya cab mein apne liye akele rukhna. Dusra, WFH days pe 'important client call' bol kar 20 minute ke liye room door band kar lena.

speaker: Seeker
text: WFH important client call wala idea actually kaafi practical hai. Unhe office ka kaam important lagta hai kyunki salary aati hai. Unhe lagega main kaam mein busy hoon toh kalesh bhi nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her to set up this small boundary today.
text: Pehle bas apne phone ya calendar mein us ek 'client meeting' ka time block karke us hisaab se mentally khud ko ready kar lo... bas itna hi ek step choti si aadat banane ke liye kaafi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main alarm laga lungi jisse woh thoda authentic lage. Subah jab maine muskurakar haan keh diya tha, toh lag raha tha jaise jail mein fas gayi, par is chote plan se thoda relief mil raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from being trapped to finding a smart relational boundary.
text: Bina kisi rishte mein takrav laye ya kalesh kiye, apni hi samajhdari se apne liye ek saans lene ki jagah dhoondh lena sach mein thoda sukoon toh deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukoon toh mil raha hai, par kabhi kabhi thoda ajeeb lagta hai ki mujhe apne hi ghar mein thoda rest lene ke liye fake meetings ka sahara lena padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the strategy not as deceit but as a cultural survival mechanism.
text: Apne hi bachav aur mental health ke liye kaam ka hawala dena dhokha nahi hota, yeh unhe bina hurt kiye apni limits ko bachane ka ek bohot valid aur harmless tareeqa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Unhe waise bhi kabhi samajh nahi aayega ki dual burden kya hota hai. Main kisi ka bura nahi kar rahi, bas apne liye 15 minute nikal rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration of exhaustion breaking for a moment of relief.
text: Itne lambe samay se jo waqt doosron ko diya ja raha tha, usme se aakhir kaar apne liye ek 15 minute ka haq nikalna hi ek nayi shuruaat dikh raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur is shuruaat se main shanti se agle hafte ka schedule plan kar lungi. Aaj main waqai bohot dari hui thi par ab confidence aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her intelligence and resilience.
text: Tumhare andar ki is himmat aur aage ka waqt bina ghabraye plan karne ki is taqat ko dekh kar lagta hai ki tum aane wale badlaav ko bohot gracefully handle kar logi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much. Mera rona aur darna thoda khatam hua. Ab thodi der laptop band karke sukoon se baithungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gentle well-being check-in before closing.
text: Is ghutan ke thoda kam hone aur rasta milne ke baad, kya ab tum sach mein bina kisi tension ke apni chai enjoy kar paogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main chai banaungi aur aaram se baithungi. Aaj ke liye bohot acha guidance mila, I really appreciate it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing statement reflecting her dual role and newly found balance.
text: Ek pyari beti aur zimmewar bahu hone ke saare farz nibhate hue, ab khud ko akela padne se bachane ki yeh umeed aur aaram sach mein bohot keemti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: In-laws ne decide kiya hai ki wo yahi rahenge taaki mujh par child pressure bana sakein, kyunki samaj mein sab keh rahe hain ki main 'expired' hone wali hoon. Main apni suppressed ambition aur career growth ki bali dene ko taiyar hoon kyunki main parivaar mein kalesh nahi chahti. Sasural ki maryada banaye rakhne ke liye maine apne saare darr daba liye hain taaki pati aur in-laws ka samman bana rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational cost of sacrificing her own ambition to maintain family respect.
text: Aapke shabdon se lag raha hai ki sabka samman aur shanti banaye rakhne ke liye aapne apne khud ke career aur sapno ko poori tarah se kinare kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki main sach mein parivaar mein kalesh nahi chahti. Meri promotion due thi, par ab jab saas-sasur yahan hain toh ghar aakar bhi office ka kaam nahi kar sakti. Samaj ke taane aur meri age ko 'expired' bolna sun kar andar se bas rona aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence of conflict preventing her from focusing on her career.
text: Ghar mein kisi bhi tarah ki ashaanti ya taane-baane ka darr itna gehra hai ki aapko office ke baad apne due promotion aur kaam ke baare mein sochne tak ki permission nahi de raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar main laptop kholun toh taane shuru ho jate hain ki sasural ki maryada bhool rahi hoon aur baby planning mein dhyan nahi hai. Har din bas yahi sochti hoon ki kya main itni selfish hoon jo apni ambition nahi chhod pa rahi, par kalesh nahi chahti kisi se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame where her ambition feels like a betrayal to her role as a daughter-in-law.
text: Ek aadarsh bahu ka farz aap itni shiddat se nibha rahi hain ki us role ke bojh tale aapke khud ke professional sapne aur mehnat aapko hi selfish aur galat lagne lage hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe apne aap par bahut bura lagta hai, par ek gussa bhi aata hai. Main itne saal padhai karke MNC mein aayi, aur ab bas sab 'expired' bol kar mujh par pressure daal rahe hain. Main kab tak chup rahungi, par phir wahi darr ki parivaar mein kalesh nahi chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the anger the Seeker has just named for the first time.
text: Jab itni mehnat ke baad aapko apni MNC ki pehchaan aur padhai ko aise dabana padta hai, toh yeh jo gussa andar aata hai, usko aap apne din bhar ke routine mein kahan nikal paati hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahin nahi nikal paati. Bas washroom mein jaakar akele ro leti hoon aur wapas aakar dinner serve karti hoon sabko. Aisa lagta hai jaise main charo taraf se bandh chuki hoon aur meri zindagi par mera koi control hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of being trapped/helpless per the C3+Relational_Preservation formula.
text: Lagta hai is sasural ke mahol aur lagatar umeedon ke beech aap poori tarah se trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapki apne life ke decisions lene ki azaadi bilkul bandh gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, main poori tarah helpless feel karti hoon. Mere husband bhi kehte hain ki kuch saal compromise kar lo maa-baap ki khushi ke liye. Par unhe nahi dikhta ki meri suppressed ambition mujhe andar se kha rahi hai. Kya main galat kar rahi hoon apne career ko itni importance de kar?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a short restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Apne career aur itne saalon ki mehnat ke liye khade hone par bhi, yeh umeed poori na kar pane ka guilt aapko andar hi andar khud par shaq karne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... kyunki mujhe sabko khush rakhna hai. Samaj ki nazar mein ek complete family dena aur in-laws ka samman badhana hi successful bahu hone ki nishani hai. Par main exhaust ho chuki hoon yeh acting kar karke ki main yahan khush hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her exhaustion as culturally normal for working women in her context.
text: Working auraton se humare samaj mein aisi umeed ki jati hai ki wo bina complain kiye apna career daba dein aur perfectly family badhayein, aise mein lagatar yeh acting karna sach mein aapko mentally nichod deta hai; par is gehri thakan ke bawajood aapki khud ki ek azaad value us maryada se alag hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, mujhe sach mein sunkar thodi relief mili. Par phir bhi dar lagta hai ki agar maine ye baby pressure sach mein reject kar diya toh shayad meri shadi hi khatam ho jayegi aur meri duniya bikhar jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Holding phase for moderate risk flag protocol check regarding her fear of collapse.
text: Shaadi tootne aur sab bikhar jane ka yeh gehra darr aap akele apne zehen mein har pal utha kar chal rahi hain. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hoon, aap tension mat lijiye. Main practically theek hoon, bas emotionally completely drain ho gayi hoon. Main bas chahti hoon ki yeh jo roz-roz 'expired' wali baatein hoti hain, inka asar mujh par kam ho jaye. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lowering risk flag with warm line, then using systemic anecdote to normalize.
text: Tumhara yahan safely apni baat keh pana sabse zaroori hai mere liye. Working bahuon mein aise motherhood timeline ko lekar anxiety bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki hum sab par sasural ki maryada banaye rakhne ka pressure itna gehra hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly, sab chup rehte hain izzat bachane ke liye. Par main ab is ghutan ke sath nahi ji sakti. Promotion pass aa raha hai. Mujhe koi raasta batao ki main apni job ko aur apni mental health ko kaise bachaun bina kisi se lade? Ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actionable steps that avoid direct conflict.
text: Jab bina direct kalesh ke rasta nikalna ho toh kuch chhote kadam try kar sakte hain. Ek, kya aap office se aate waqt cab mein hi 10 minute apni manager se zaroori emails clear kar sakti hain ghar pohochne se pehle? Ya doosra, jab in-laws ke taane shuru hon toh politely 'mujhe ek urgent client email bhejni hai' bol kar room mein thodi der ke liye hat sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Room mein chale jana zyada practical lag raha hai. Cab mein wese bhi main kaam dekhti hoon, par hall mein baithte hi taane aate hain. 'Urgent email' bol kar wahan se uth jane se direct disrespect bhi nahi lagegi aur main arguments se bach jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a specific, easily executable step.
text: Chalo isko ek aasan aadat mein badalte hain. Pehle yeh karo ki aaj shaam jab aisi chubhnewali baat shuru ho… phir sirf itna kaho 'Main abhi aati hoon, ek urgent office reply karna bacha hai' aur shanti se room mein jao… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye strategy main kar sakti hoon aaj se hi. Par jab wo akele mein baar-baar bolti hain ki tumhari aayu badd rahi hai aur bacha paida karna hi aurat ka sabse bada kaam hai, tab mera confidence poora toot jata hai. Aisa lagta hai meri padhai, mere achievements ki koi aukat hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on why such language is used, separating her worth from the insults.
text: Yeh umeed ki aurat ka poora wajood sirf maa banne se juda hai, humare traditional family structures ka ek purana hissa hai jo auraton ki azaadi ko limit karne ke liye use hota aaya hai; yeh unka mindset hai, jo aapki mehnat aur corporate achievements ki asli value ko kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: System ko samajhna logical lagta hai, par practically relative ki nazarein aur baatein chubhti hain. Ek ajeeb si sharam aati hai jaise main ek adhoori aur defective aurat hoon jo time par family badhane ka natural kaam bhi nahi kar paa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Following stigma protocol with a gentle, shorter restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Ek arse se in nazaron aur 'adhoori' hone ke taano ko jhelte-jhelte aapne is sharam ko khud par bojh ki tarah odh liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... maine sach mein ye sharam ko khud par haawi hone diya. Par ab aapki baaton se lag raha hai ki mera career bhi toh meri hi mehnat hai. Main unki 'expired' wali negative baaton ko apne oopar asar nahi karne doongi ab se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encouraging her to explore how this new perspective will help her face the pressure.
text: Apni job ko apni identity ka ek strong aur independent hissa maanne wali yeh soch, aage chalkar rozmara ke in taano ke samne aapko khud ko shant rakhne mein kaise madad karegi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki jab mere dimaag mein meri professional value clear hogi, toh unka baar baar ye kehna ki main buddhi ho rahi hoon, mujhe pehle jaisa hurt nahi karega. Main samajh jaungi ki ye unki mentality hai, meri reality nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her internal boundary-setting as a strength.
text: Apne khud ke professional wajood aur samne wale ki traditional mindset ke beech yeh ek mazboot invisible deewar khadi karna, aapki sach mein ek bohut badi strength hai jo aapke samman aur sukoon dono ko bacha sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein is boundary se mujhe pehli baar thoda sa relief feel ho raha hai. Main abhi bhi parivaar mein kalesh nahi chahti, isliye unse argue nahi karungi, par mentally unki negative baaton se detach rahungi jab main apne room mein aa jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on how this focused time will help rebuild her over time.
text: Aakhir itne waqt ke baad, ek clear rasta dikh raha hai jahan aapko seedhe kisi se lade bina, apne dimag ka sukoon aur apne sapno ko time dene ki ek personal jagah mil gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Main aaj shaam hi is 'urgent email' wali choti si trick ko try karungi jab saas-ma wo planning wali baat shuru karengi. Mujhe har cheez mein apni ambition ki bali dene ki ab zaroorat nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing that ambition is healthy and distancing from societal pressure is empowering.
text: Apni ambition ko space dena aur uske liye khade hona bilkul samajhdari ka kadam hai, kyunki ek aurat ka career sirf uski job nahi hoti, balki uski independence aur confidence ka sabse bada hissa hota hai jise kisi ki umeed daba nahi sakti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Independence ka ehsaas hi toh kho diya tha maine lagatar 'maryada' ke dar mein jite hue. Aaj lag raha hai ki main wapas control le sakti hoon apni life ka thoda sa. Kal weekend hai, main aaram se apne husband se bhi is nayi approach ke baare mein thodi baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to articulate her feelings about bringing her husband into this new space.
text: Jab aap kal apne husband se is vishay par poori shanti aur nayi himmat ke sath baat karne ka sochti hain, toh andar se kaisa feel ho raha hai aapko is conversation ke baare mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda nervous hoon kyunki wo parents ko jaldi offend nahi karna chahte, par ek nayi umeed bhi hai. Main unhe convince nahi karungi, bas inform karungi ki mere work hours mein mujhe apni space chahiye. Wo ache hain, dheere dheere support karne lagenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her shift from helplessness to calmly asserting her boundaries with her partner.
text: Ek supportive partner ki jagah lekar, aap unko samaj ki in expectations aur farz se upar uth kar, apna nazaraiya aur apni work boundary poore aaram se batane ki tayari kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, exactly. Main kalesh nahi chahti par main apne promotion ko aise haath se jaane bhi nahi doongi. Main apne husband ke sath as a team chalna chahti hoon. Is chat ke baad mera bojh sach mein bahut halka ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation of her strength in balancing duty while calmly reclaiming her space.
text: Dono ko ek team ki tarah dekhna aur in sabhi bandhano ke beech bhi bina rishtey bigade apne professional khwabon ki jagah nikal lena, yeh aapki us samajh aur mental maturity ko darshata hai jo aapko zaroor kamyaab banayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jab Sasu-ma ne kaha ki meri badhti age ke karan ab wo yahi reh kar meri lifestyle aur kundali ke upay monitor karengi, toh mera dum ghutne laga. Par main virodh nahi kar sakti kyunki unhone mere rishta aur dowry ke waqt bahut kurbaniyan di thi aur ab mera farz hai unki har zidd maan-na. 'Log kya kahenge' ki bahu ne buzurgon ko thukra diya, is darr se main bas unki seva mein jut gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the social fear and the heavy burden of past relational debts that are keeping her silent.
text: Unki pichli kurbaniyon ka bojh aur samaj ka darr dono milkar aapko aur chup kara rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sach mein. Mere aandar guilt itna bhar gaya hai ki main unki kundali wali baat par bhi kuch bol nahi pa rahi. Apna ghar ab apna lagta hi nahi hai, par main virodh nahi kar sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence that speaking up might destroy the relationship she is duty-bound to protect.
text: Aapko lag raha hai ki kuch bhi kehne se woh purana ehsaan aur rishta khatam ho jayega, aur saari galti aapki mani jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unhone dowry ke time compromise kiya tha, toh ab umar bhar mujhe dab ke rehna padega. Kabhi kabhi gussa bhi aata hai, par phir lagta hai main hi buri hoon jo aisa soch rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the long-term emotional toll of living under obligation, with a soft pause for the stigma cue.
text: Itne saalon se us ek baat ka ehsaan chukate hue aapka apna wajood kahin dabta ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wajood toh jaise khatam hi ho gaya hai. Din bhar bas unki seva aur unke taane suno. Aur ab toh permanent yahan rehne ka plan hai unka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question about how this permanent shift impacts her ability to function daily.
text: Is nayi shuruaat aur unke hamesha ke liye yahan rukne ke khayal se aapki rozmara ki zindagi par kya asar pad raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Rozmara ki zindagi bachi kahan hai. Main bas ek machine ban gayi hoon. Aandar hi aandar main is ghutan se bhagna chahti hoon, par main virodh nahi kar sakti. Guilt kha jata hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific underlying feeling of being trapped when bound by guilt and family dynamics.
text: Lagta hai jaise aap apne hi ghar mein buri tarah phans chuki hain—ek aisi bebasi jahan apna dard dikhana bhi apno ke khilaf lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum yahi feeling hai. Bebasi. Agar main thoda sa bhi apni space mangu, toh turant dowry aur kurbaniyan yaad dila di jati hain. Kya karu main?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feeling of suffocation as culturally normal while preserving her individual worth.
text: Aise taano ke beech ghutan mehsus karna bilkul swabhavik hai, hamari society mein aksar bahuon ko purane ehsano tale daba diya jata hai; lekin iska matlab yeh nahi ki aapka apna koi haq ya izzat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you ye bolne ke liye. Mujhe hamesha lagta tha ki main sach mein ek selfish bahu hoon jo unki kurbaniyon ki kadar nahi kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the self-blame that comes from the strict expectations of her role.
text: Apne farz ko itni lagan se nibhane ke baad bhi aap khud ko hi dosh de rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki sab yahi sochte hain. Par ab sach mein thak gayi hoon main. Main virodh nahi kar sakti, par main is ghutan mein aur jee bhi nahi paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to normalize the intense pressure to be an ideal daughter-in-law.
text: Ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye apni awaz daba dena hamare yahan bahut common hai — sirf aapka dukh nahi hai yeh, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki adarsh bahu banne ka pressure sab par hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Ye adarsh bahu ka tag bohot bhaari hai. Main thoda theek hona chahti hoon, is saas-bahu ke roz ke chakkar mein aage kya karoon kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, duty-compatible ways to reclaim personal time without causing a family dispute.
text: Is bhari routine ke beech, aap chote hisso mein apne liye jagah bana sakti hain. Ya toh subah uthkar 10 minute akele chai piyein bina kisi duty ke, ya phir dopahar mein jab sab aaram karein, tab apni pasand ka koi geet ya katha sun lein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah uthkar akele chai peena shayad possible ho, kyunki wo log thoda late uthte hain. Us waqt mujhe taane marne wala koi nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step for the very next day.
text: Pehle kal subah sabke uthne se 10 minute pehle apni chai banaiye… phir aaram se apne kamre ki khidki ke paas baith kar use piyein… bas itna hi kal ke liye plan kijiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main try karungi. At least wo 10 minute toh mere honge. Par jab unki kundali aur badhti age wali baatein shuru hoti hain, toh main virodh nahi kar sakti, wahan kya karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the cultural narrative around horoscopes and age to protect her internal self-worth.
text: Umar ya kundali ko lekar taane marna hamari parivarik vyavastha ka ek hissa ban gaya hai auraton ko control karne ke liye, yeh baatein aapki asliyat ya kshamata ko nahi darshati hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sunkar dil ko thodi tasalli mili. Main humesha unki baaton ko sach maan leti thi. Guilt ab bhi hai, par thoda control mein lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift in how she processes the hurtful comments internally.
text: Unki baaton ka asar ab aap par pehle se thoda alag dhang se ho raha hai, jahan aap unhe aur apne astitva ko alag dekh pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish kar rahi hoon. Rishta todna ya jhagda karna mera maqsad nahi hai. Unki kurbaniyon ki respect hai mujhe, par khud ko mitana bhi theek nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking her to visualize the feeling of taking her small step while keeping the peace.
text: Is nayi samajh ke sath, kal jab aap subah apni chai piyengi, toh aandar se kya alag mehsus karne ki ummeed hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad thodi shanti. Ek choti si jeet wali feeling ki maine kam se kam apne liye kuch toh kiya. Main virodh nahi kar sakti samne se, par apna dhyan toh rakh sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her ability to find an independent path that honors her duties.
text: Khud ki shanti ko ahmiyat dena ek chupi hui par bahut badi taqat hai, aur bina rishta tode apne liye yeh rasta nikalna sach mein qabile tareef hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe sach mein lag raha tha ki main paagal ho jaungi is ghar mein. Ab lag raha hai ki kuch chote raste hain survive karne ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the fading of the overwhelming dread as she finds survival strategies.
text: Woh purani bechaini aur darr ka manzar, jo pehle har waqt haavi rehta tha, ab dheere dheere kam ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kaafi kam ho gaya hai. Main kal se chai wali aadat shuru karungi. Agar sasu-ma ne kuch bola toh chupchap sun lungi par dil par nahi lagaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her continued dedication to her role alongside her new boundary.
text: Ek achi bahu ka farz aap aaj bhi poori nishtha se poora kar rahi hain, bas usme ab aapne apne liye ek choti si surakshit jagah bana li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi surakshit jagah hi kafi hai abhi ke liye. Unki umar bhi ho gayi hai, so main virodh nahi kar sakti, I accept that. Par apna breathing space le lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the structural need for rest when constantly serving others.
text: Apne breathing space ko pehchanna aapke liye bahut zaroori tha, kyunki hamare samaj mein auraton se bas doosron ko sehne ki ummeed ki jati hai bina unki thakan ko samjhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Kisi ko meri thakan nahi dikhti, sabko lagta hai main free baithi hoon. Par koi baat nahi, main apne hisse ki shanti nikal lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how she will maintain this new perspective when future pressure arises.
text: Aage aane wale dino mein jab bhi yeh bojh dubara badhne lage, toh apne is naye sukoon ko yaad rakhne ke liye aap kis cheez ka sahara lengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main yaad rakhungi ki main buri nahi hoon. Meri limit hai aur wo morning ke 10 minute meri taqat hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising her graceful acceptance of limits and her newfound emotional anchor.
text: Apni limit ko itni khoobsurti se swikar karna aur us chote se waqt ko apni sabse badi himmat banana sach mein ek sachi shuruaat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you so much meri baatein sunne ke liye. Aaj bohot time baad laga ki koi bina judge kiye mujhe sun raha hai. Main ab kal subah ka wait kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from despair to hope as she looks forward to her small win.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki aap is anjane dar aur apne rishton ki ghutan se aage badhkar, kal ki us nai subah aur apne waqt ko ummeed ki nazar se dekh pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, isliye maine apni saari complaints andar hi daba li hain. Pati ne bina mujhse pooche in-laws ka permanent shift fix kar diya kyunki 30+ hone ke baad unhe lagta hai ki mujhe ab career se zyada 'ghar basane' par dhyan dena chahiye. Maine unhe naraz karke apne sasural mein tamasha nahi banne dena, isliye main bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational sacrifice where she silences herself to prevent a family rift.
text: Tumne apni aawaz daba li taaki parivar aur rishton mein koi badi darar na aaye, aur sab theek dikhe.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Haan, aur mujhe samajh nahi aata ki meri life ke decisions mere bina kaise le liye gaye. Main bhi is ghar ka hissa hoon, par tamasha na bane isliye main ek shabd nahi bol pa rahi. Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, yahi priority ban gai hai meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of making a scene and ruining the atmosphere.
text: Andar se darr hai ki agar aaj kuch bola toh baat bahut aage badh jayegi aur tumhare sasural mein mahoul poori tarah kharab ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek toh main sasural mein waise hi naya mahoul adjust kar rahi hoon, upar se agar complaint karungi toh log kahenge kaisi bahu hai jo badon ko nahi aane de rahi. Isliye chup hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the duty frame in response to her fear of being judged as a bad daughter-in-law.
text: Bahu hone ka farz nibhane ki is koshish mein tumne khud ko bilkul side kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, bas yahi soch kar saari chinta andar daba li hain maine. Par andar hi andar bahut ghutan hoti hai jab apne MNC ki night shifts aur unka khayal ek sath imagine karti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question about her energy levels to explore the impact of hiding her struggles.
text: Jab tum yeh sab andar daba leti ho aur sab kuch khud akele manage karne ki koshish karti ho, toh tumhare apne kaam aur energy level ka kya hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaam toh suffer karta hi hai. Office mein itni meetings hoti hain, aur ab ghar pe permanent responsibilities. Mujhe bas darr lagta hai ki na main achhi employee ban paungi na achhi bahu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration and ongoing pressure of handling two lives simultaneously.
text: Pichle kuch dino se jab se yeh shift fix hua hai, tum lagatar in do zindagiyon ko ek saath handle karne ke bojh tale dabti ja rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Sahi kaha. Aur gussa toh bahut aata hai jab pati ne ek baar meri preference nahi puchi. Par bolun kaise? Unhe naraz karke apne sasural mein main akele pad jaungi. Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, isliye ghut rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to softly name the implied fear of isolation if she were to express her suppressed anger.
text: Agar gussa nikal diya toh akele pad jane ka darr andar hi andar satata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa hi feel hota hai. Fase hue. Na main apna career risk mein daal sakti hoon, na un logon ko mana kar sakti hoon kyunki woh mere husband ke parents hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her unexpressed feelings of being TRAPPED/HELPLESS between her career and marriage duties.
text: Lagta hai ki tum ek aisi jagah fass gayi ho jahan na toh tum apna gussa keh sakti ho, aur na hi yeh chup rehna aur sehna aasan bacha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Haan... yeh sab kab tak chalega? Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, yeh soch kar main apni pehchan hi bhoolti ja rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feeling of being trapped as culturally normal for working women, separating her worth from the outcome.
text: Main samajh sakti hoon ki working woman hone ke bawajood, aisi traditional expectation rehna bahut thaka dene wala hota hai, aur yeh fasa hua feel karna bilkul natural hai, iska tumhari kabiliyat se koi lena-dena nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Par is ghutan mein koi openly baat nahi karta family mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote about families to normalize her silence without suggesting an immediate solution.
text: Humari families mein aisi dynamics bahut common hain—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki rishton ka bojh sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Par mujhe kuch toh raasta nikalna padega na? Ab kya karoon? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two low-effort, practical suggestions to protect her work hours without escalating family conflict.
text: Agar theek lage toh, apne office ke crucial hours ki ek list bana sakti ho, ya phir bas apne husband se client meetings ke time par 'no disturbance' ki ek calm request kar sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Unse baat karna risky hai abhi. List wala idea thoda safe lag raha hai, isse direct confrontation bhi nahi hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the planner suggestion into a single, concrete execution step for today.
text: Pehle ek planner ya dairy mein working hours likh lo… phir us list ko apne room mein laga dena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh bina jhagda kiye apna time fix karne jaisa hai. Isse in-laws ko indirectly pata chal jayega aur kaam bhi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe using information about the societal dual-burden placed on women.
text: Auraton pe ghar aur bahar dono ko perfect manage karne ka structural dabav itna hota hai ki hume lagta hai sab humari hi zimmewari hai, par yeh bas society ka framework hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unhe lagta hai mere laptop pe baithna bas ek hobby hai. Mere appraisal ki fikar sirf mujhe hi hai wahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational disconnect and her feeling of her career being undervalued by the family.
text: Jab doosro ki umeedon mein tumhare career ko itna halke mein liya jaye, toh aisi disconnect bahut chubh sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh dard hai. Mujhe umeed thi ki pati se support milega, par usne apna farz bhula kar poora bojh mere sar daal diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the failure of duty and support she expected from her husband.
text: Tumhe lagta hai ki ek partner ka jo basic sath milna chahiye tha apne farz nibhane mein, woh bilkul nahi mila.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Par ab woh shift ho rahe hain toh mujhe naye aane se pehle desk alag kamre mein shift kar leni chahiye shayad. Wi-Fi ka connection wahan strong hai, yeh reason de sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the feasibility of her new idea to quietly shift her desk.
text: Kya aisa kuch aur hai is nayi desk setup ke alawa jo tum shuru kar sakti ho bina kisi takrao ke?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main lunch ke liye sabziyan raat ko kaat sakti hoon. Taaki dopahar mein client meetings ke beech unko khana waqt pe mil jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her practical duty-based approach to balancing work and family quietly.
text: Raat ko pehle se tayaari karke tum apna bahu ka farz bhi pura kar logi aur office ki zaroorat ko bhi bacha logi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main direct ladaai nahi afford kar sakti apne sasural mein. Isliye yahi theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore the personal toll and physical energy drain of this extra preparation.
text: Lekin yeh extra kaam akele karne se tumhari apni energy aur neend par iska kya asar padne wala hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan toh hogi hi. Par weekend pe agar advance meal prep kar loon toh poora hafta aaram se handle ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her problem-solving capability and validating her practical approach within cultural constraints.
text: Tumhara yeh beech ka rasta nikalna dikhata hai ki tum kitni practicality se in mushkil halaton ko face kar rahi ho bina shanti khoye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ki shanti bhang na ho
text: Thank you. Bas dua karti hoon sab aaram se ho. Ghar ki shanti bhang na ho, aur mera kaam bhi safe rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the emotional relief of protecting her workspace while keeping relationships intact.
text: Aane wale dino mein tum rishton ko shant rakhne aur apna wajood bachane ka ek bahut delicate balance banane ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Thoda relax feel ho raha hai baat karke. Ab main ja kar desk setup aur planner ka kaam dekh leti hoon. Apna kaam toh karna hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing final reassurance to validate her courage in establishing a new framework and offering future support.
text: Apna naya schedule shuru karne ke liye dher saari himmat, main yahan hamesha hoon jab bhi dobara baat karni ho ya man halka karna ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti main... In-laws ke aane ke baad meri bachi-kuchi identity aur career gap ki chinta aur gehari ho gayi hai. Wo kehte hain ki meri 'umar' nikal rahi hai aur ab mujhe sirf bhagwan aur parivaar ki seva karni chahiye, aur main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti. Apne sapno ko kurban karke main bas ek aadarsh bahu banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki khandaan ka naam kharab na ho. Andar hi andar sharam aati hai ki main khud ke liye kuch nahi kar paayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring how relational duty to the in-laws and family name is causing her to sacrifice her own identity and dreams.
text: Aapki baaton se lag raha hai ki apne in-laws aur khandaan ka sir ooncha rakhne ki is poori koshish mein, aapne apni pehchaan aur apne sapno ko ek dum se chup-chap peeche chhod diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Haan, aur karoon bhi kya? Unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti na. Agar thoda bhi apne baare mein bolungi toh logon mein baat phelegi ki bahu ne ghar ki beizzati kar di. Pata nahi yeh aadarsh bahu ka farz mujhe kahan le jayega. Mera career gap badhta ja raha hai aur main bas ghar ke kaamon ki bankar reh gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a shorter restatement to soften the stigma cue around the fear of causing family dishonor.
text: Ghar ki izzat kharab hone aur logon ki baaton ka darr aapko andar hi andar chup rehne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Bilkul. Sab rishtedaar yehi dekhte hain ki bahu kitni seva kar rahi hai. Aur meri umar ko leke toh lagatar taane milte hain ki ab toh padhai-likhai ka time nikal gaya. Main apne aap ko itna lachar mehsoos karti hoon. Lekin unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti, toh sab sahan kar leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the emotional weight of constantly absorbing these taunts without responding.
text: Is tarah roz taano ko sunna aur apni har aawaz ko apno ke saamne daba lene se, aapko sabse zyada thakaan aur bojh kis baat ka lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse zyada bojh is baat ka lagta hai ki maine khud ko poori tarah kho diya hai. Yeh meri lost identity mujhe har pal chubhti hai. Pehle mere bhi kuch ambition the, par ab lagta hai jaise main bas ek zariya hoon jiska kaam sirf doosron ko khush rakhna aur seva karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed emotion of being trapped in her relational duty.
text: Lagta hai ki apno ko khush rakhne aur ek aadarsh bahu banne ki is anant koshish mein, aap khud ko poori tarah se 'trapped' aur lachar mehsoos kar rahi hain, jaise nikalne ka aur koi rasta hi na bacha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul trapped. Kabhi kabhi itna gussa aata hai ki main in sab taano se door bhag jaaun aur apna career fir shuru karun. Par phir wahi khandaan ka farz saamne aa jata hai. Mere maayke wale kya sochenge agar maine parivaar mein jhagda kiya? Main unka sir bhi nahi jhuka sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the cultural normality of swallowing anger to protect family honor.
text: Apne gusse aur dard ko peeche rakh kar apne maayke aur sasural dono ki izzat ke baare mein pehle sochna, humare samaj ki betiyon ke liye ek bohot aam zimmedari bana di gayi hai. Aapka yeh ghutan mehsoos karna aur akele chhoote hue mehsoos karna bilkul laazmi hai; yeh is baat ka saboot hai ki aap un rishton ko bachane ke liye kitna bada samjhauta kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Samjhauta hi toh meri majboori hai. Main bas chidchidi hoti ja rahi hoon andar se. Ek waqt tha jab main bhi life mein kuch banana chahti thi, aur ab yeh lambi career gap! Par unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti, isliye yeh saari sharam aur ghutan akele hi pi rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the burden on married women.
text: Humari families mein ek shadi-shuda aurat se yeh umeed karna ki wo apne khud ke sapne poori tarah bhool kar sirf seva par dhyaan de, bohot common pattern hai — yeh sirf aapke saath nahi ho raha, lekin log is baare mein khul kar bolte nahi kyunki adarsh bahu ka medal is chuppi se hi juda hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi baat hai. Koi nahi bolta, bas sab umeed karte hain. Par is 'medal' ko pehenne mein mujhe jo cost chukani pad rahi hai, wo meri aatma jaisi cheez hai. Phir lagta hai shayad umar nikalne ki baat sach hi bol rahe hain wo. Sharam aati hai apni is kamzori par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting how her role demands are causing her to internalize shame and doubt her own potential.
text: Ek taraf aapke andar apne liye kuch karne ki chahat zinda hai, aur doosri taraf ek aadarsh bahu ka farz nibhane ka dabaav aapko apni hi himmat aur umar par sawal uthane par majboor kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ekdum yahi ho raha hai. Agar thodi si bhi awaz uthayi toh mere sasural ka sab kuch bikhar jayega aur log baatein banayenge. Par kya mere paas sach mein ab koi rasta bacha hi nahi? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ki main bina kalesh kiye khud ko zinda kaise rakhun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, non-disruptive options to engage with her career interests without triggering family conflict.
text: Rishton ko nibhate hue aur ghar ki shanti banaye rakhte hue bhi, hum aapki lost identity ke liye koi choti si shuruaat kar sakte hain. Kya aap din mein 15 minute nikal kar akele mein apne field ke baare mein kuch naya padh sakti hain, ya apne kisi bharosemand purane college friend se career ko lekar casually baat kar sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost ko call karna thoda risky ho jayega, in-laws sara din yahi rehte hain aur har phone call par dhyan dete hain. Par dopahar mein jab wo dono sote hain, tab shayad main 15-20 minute apne phone par apne purane profession se related kuch articles ya videos zaroor dekh sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a concrete, immediate first step.
text: Dopahar ka yeh waqt aapke liye ekdum safe aur accha ho sakta hai. Pehle yeh karo ki kal dopahar mein jab sab aaram kar rahe hon, bas 15 minute ke liye apne phone par apne interest ka koi ek article padho… phir chahe toh phone ke notes mein hi uske baare mein 2 line likh lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main aaram se kar sakti hoon. Isme kisi ko koi objection bhi nahi hoga aur mujhe bhi lagega ki main bhagwan aur parivaar ki seva ke alawa bhi kuch exist karti hoon. Pehle toh main apne baare mein sochne par hi sharminda hone lagti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the systemic guilt imposed on women who think of their own lives.
text: Samaj ka banaya hua yeh structure hi aisa hai jahan agar ek aurat thoda bhi apne baare mein soche, toh use khud par hi doubt hone lagta hai. Apne baare mein yeh soch aur guilt aapki aapsi kami nahi hai, balki un structural umeedon ka natija hai jo humesha tyaag mangti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe hain. Yeh structure hi aisa hai ki auraton ko bas farz dikhaya jata hai aur hum usme ghir jaate hain. Par ab main is dopahar wale akele time ko waqai seriously lungi. Chalo, koi choti si nayi shuruat toh hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her shift from long-term suppression to carving out a sliver of time for herself.
text: Itne lambe waqt se jo career wale sapne aapne poori tarah daba diye the, aaj unke liye wapas ek chhoti hi sahi, par ek nayi jagah banana aapko ek tasalli de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Haan, bas yahi choti si tasalli bachi hai ab. Main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti thi, toh mujhe yahi rasta theek lag raha hai. Apne andar ki us bhooli hui insaan ko zinda toh rakhungi is 15 minute mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her feelings of quiet empowerment and hope.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki in chupke se kiye gaye chhote prayason se, aap apni us 'lost identity' ko bina kisi parivaarik takraav ke dobara thoda thoda wapas mehsoos kar pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum waisa hi hai. Par kabhi kabhi darr lagta hai ki agar in-laws achanak jag gaye aur unhone mujhe phone mein itna focused padhte dekh liya toh? Phir se khandaan aur meri 'umar' ki baatein shuru ho jayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering safe boundary-keeping responses that fit within her relational constraints.
text: Agar kabhi aisa koi achanak sawal aaye, toh aap ghar ke maahoul ke hisaab se hi jawab soch sakti hain. Jaise kehna ki 'Ghar ki naye ration ki list online dekh rahi thi', ya 'Bas aise hi thodi der rest karte waqt news padh rahi thi'. Kya inme se kuch aasan aur theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main keh sakti hoon ki koi khaane ki recipe dhoondh rahi thi ya ghar ka hisaab phone par laga rahi thi. Unko fir utna shaq ya problem nahi hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her pragmatic strategy to avoid conflict by leveraging domestic excuses.
text: Ghar ke kaam ka hi bahaana aage karke, aap unke gusse aur kisi bhi naye taane ko shuru hone se pehle hi handle karne ka raasta nikal rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Dekho, apne bhalai ke liye jhooth bolna pad raha hai apno se. Ek aadarsh bahu ko yeh thodi karna chahiye. Isliye thodi sharam aati hai. Par main is career gap ko ab bilkul apne haath se nikalne bhi nahi de sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating that using harmless excuses to survive restrictive environments is smart, not shameful.
text: Apne aage badhne ke chhote raston ko banaye rakhne ke liye aise aam bahaane banana koi swarth nahi hai. Khaas taur par aisi sthiti mein jahan sidhe taur par izzat se apni baat rakhna sambhav na ho, aapka yeh kadam aapki zidd aur apni pehchaan bachane ki samajhdari dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton ne meri us guilt ko kaafi kam kar diya. Waise bhi is farz ke boj ke alawa mere paas kuch tha hi nahi zindagi mein. Lekin main andar se aisi marr kar nahi jeena chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her determination to keep her inner self alive despite the duty demands.
text: Duniya ke hisaab se ek aadarsh bahu ka dikhawa karte hue bhi, aap andar se khud ki chahaton ko poori tarah marne nahi dena chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Haan, aur wahi ekmatra ladaai bachi hai meri ab. Main unke saamne hamesha sar jhukaye rakhti hoon kyunki sach mein unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti. Lekin mann hi mann, main apni us 15 minute ki ek alag duniya toh zaroor banaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframing that creating quiet, invisible space is a necessary survival mechanism for women in patriarchal families.
text: Parivaar ke riwazon ki vajah se humari auraton ko apne wajood ke aksar do hisse karne padte hain. Bahar sabke anusaar farz nibhate hue, andar apne sapno ki ek aisi safe jagah bana lena, khud ko bikharne se bachane ka ek bohot takatwar tareeqa hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot takatwar tareeqa... Yeh sunkar kaafi himmat mil rahi hai. Main koi aisi buri insaan nahi hoon. Pata nahi main kyun is choti si baat par itna dara hua mehsoos karti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her realization of commonality with other women, which reduces her self-blame.
text: Doosri auraton ki aisi sthiti aur dukh ko soch kar, shayad aapko yeh dikh raha hai ki aap khud ki nazron mein koi galat insaan nahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi baat hai. Main kal se dopahar ki planning shuru karungi. Mujhe apne saare ghar ke routine ko thoda theek se manage karna padega taaki wo 15-20 minute pakka mere ho sakein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the new sense of purpose and motivation to plan her day.
text: Apne din ki planning aur routine ko naye sire se set karne ki soch mein, lagta hai aapke andar ek bohot sakaratmak energy aur umeed fir se jaag gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, mujhe sach mein halka aur clear mehsoos ho raha hai. Ab main is chinti aur lachari mein doobi nahi rahungi. Aapka shukriya mujhe meri power aur practical solution yaad dilane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her courage to balance her duties with a safe space for herself.
text: Aaj jis himmat ke saath aapne apne sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne aur apne bheetar ke sapno ko choti si saans lene ki jagah dene ka balance dhoondha hai, wo vakayi taareef ke kaabil hai. Apne aap se dobara judne ka aapka yeh kadam bohot sundar hai.
